title: hieracium cordatum subsp. adenocerinthe
intro: Hieracium cordatum subsp. adenocerinthe is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's leaves and flowers have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Hieracium cordatum subsp. adenocerinthe can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in salves and creams to aid in wound healing and skin health.
